demographics.RIDRETH1: Race/Hispanic origin (1 = Mexican American, 2 = Other Hispanic, 3 = Non-Hispanic White, 4 = Non-Hispanic Black, 5 = Other Race)
demographics.DMDEDUC2: Education level - Adults 20+ (1 = Less than 9th grade, 2 = 9-11th grade, 3 = High school grad/GED, 4 = Some college or AA degree, 5 = College graduate or above)
demographics.DMDMARTL: Marital status (1 = Married, 2 = Widowed, 3 = Divorced, 4 = Separated, 5 = Never married, 6 = Living with partner)
demographics.INDFMPIR: Ratio of family income to poverty

questionnaire.DIQ010: Doctor told you have diabetes (1 = Yes, 2 = No)
questionnaire.BPQ020: Ever told you had high blood pressure (1 = Yes, 2 = No)
questionnaire.SMQ020: Smoked at least 100 cigarettes in life (1 = Yes, 2 = No)
questionnaire.ALQ101: Had at least 12 alcohol drinks/1 year (1 = Yes, 2 = No)
